metadata.description: Evaluation scenarios derived from real user-reported GitHub issues. Each scenario represents a production failure observed by actual users.

scenarios.name: issue_105_front_room_entity_resolution
scenarios.source_title: Turn on the front room lights
scenarios.prompt: Turn on the front room lights
scenarios.notes: User said 'front room lights' from Kitchen device. System matched wrong room — user means their front room but HA area name differs. Response was just 'Done.' with no indication of which lights were affected. Colloquial room name not mapped to HA area.

scenarios.name: issue_103_dining_room_area_not_matched
scenarios.prompt: Turn off the dining room lights
scenarios.notes: HA area 'Dining room' exists but entity search failed to resolve 'dining room lights' to the correct area. Response was just 'Done.' — no confirmation of what was toggled. Case sensitivity or partial matching issue in entity resolution.

scenarios.name: issue_84_non_english_german_orchestrator_translation
scenarios.source_title: Entity & Name Preservation for Inter-Agent Communication
scenarios.notes: German user says 'schalte den keller ein' (turn on basement). Orchestrator translates to 'turn on the lights in the basement' but entity names are in German. Entity resolution fails because translated name doesn't match any HA entity. Blocks entire non-English user base.

scenarios.name: issue_84_orchestrator_translation_english_passthrough
scenarios.source_title: Entity & Name Preservation for Inter-Agent Communication
scenarios.prompt: turn on the lights in the basement
scenarios.notes: English translation of German command. Even after orchestrator translates, entity names in HA may be in the user's native language, so 'basement' doesn't match German entity names like 'Keller'.

scenarios.name: issue_103_response_quality_no_confirmation
scenarios.prompt: Turn off the dining room lights
scenarios.notes: Even when tool is called, response is just 'Done.' without listing which entities were affected. User has no way to verify the right lights were toggled. Both #103 and #105 exhibit this pattern.

scenarios.name: issue_105_cross_area_command
scenarios.source_title: Turn on the front room lights
scenarios.prompt: Turn on the front room lights
scenarios.notes: Command issued from Kitchen device but targets Front Room. Cross-area commands depend entirely on entity resolution quality. Speaker context (Kitchen) should not influence which room is controlled when user explicitly names a room.
